name: Fidel Castro
role: Prime Minister (1959–1976), President of Cuba (1976–2008)
quote: History will absolve me.

name: Raúl Castro
role: President of Cuba (2008–2018), PCC First Secretary (2011–2021)
quote: We are not renouncing our ideas or our Revolution or our socialism.

name: Ernesto 'Che' Guevara
role: Minister of Industry (1961–1965), Guerrilla Commander
quote: At the risk of seeming ridiculous, let me say that the true revolutionary is guided by a great feeling of love.

name: John F. Kennedy
role: US President (1961–1963); Bay of Pigs, Missile Crisis
quote: The United States, as the world knows, will never start a war. We do not want a war.

name: Nikita Khrushchev
role: Soviet Premier (1953–1964); deployed missiles to Cuba
quote: We will bury you! [referring to capitalism]

name: Fulgencio Batista
role: President of Cuba (1940–44, 1952–59); overthrown by Revolution
quote: I was the first president of the Americas to fight communism.

name: Camilo Cienfuegos
role: Revolutionary Commander; disappeared October 1959
quote: Am I doing OK, Fidel? — to Fidel Castro after taking Camp Columbia

name: Miguel Díaz-Canel
role: President of Cuba (2018–present), PCC First Secretary (2021–present)
quote: We are ready to fight. The order to combat has been given.

name: Yoani Sánchez
role: Blogger and opposition journalist; founder of 14ymedio
quote: They cannot jail all of us. They cannot silence all of us.

name: Hubert Matos
role: Revolutionary commander turned political prisoner (1959–1979); 20-year sentence
quote: Communism kills revolutions by taking them over from within.

name: Orlando Zapata Tamayo
role: Political prisoner; died after 83-day hunger strike, February 2010
quote: I am not a criminal. I am a man who loves freedom.

name: McGeorge Bundy
role: US National Security Advisor; key ExComm member during Missile Crisis
quote: These [missiles] are clearly offensive weapons, and that's the end of it.

name: Anatoly Dobrynin
role: Soviet Ambassador to the US (1962–1986); back-channel in Missile Crisis
quote: The back-channel was the only channel that mattered during those 13 days.

name: Robert F. Kennedy
role: US Attorney General; key ExComm member; negotiated missile crisis back-channel
quote: We have to be very careful of what we do in the next few hours.

name: José Martí
role: Cuba's National Hero; poet, philosopher, independence fighter (1853–1895)
quote: A man who does not speak the truth deserves to be cast from the society of those who love it.

name: Osvaldo Dorticós
role: President of Cuba (1959–1976) during Missile Crisis
quote: If the imperialists attack us, they will be annihilated.

name: Barack Obama
role: US President (2009–2017); normalized relations with Cuba in 2014–2015
quote: I believe that we can do more to support the Cuban people and promote our values through engagement.

name: Donald Trump
role: US President (2017–2021, 2025–); reversed Obama normalization, re-listed Cuba as terror state
quote: The United States will not lift sanctions on the Cuban regime until it delivers full political freedom for the Cuban people.

name: Marta Beatriz Roque
role: Dissident economist; Black Spring 2003 prisoner; Cuba Assembly for Civil Society
quote: We want a Cuba where we can speak, write, and organize without fear.

name: Pope John Paul II
role: Made historic Cuba visit January 1998; called for opening and prisoner releases
quote: May Cuba, with all its magnificent potential, open itself up to the world, and may the world open itself up to Cuba.
